name: ws4_frontend
description:
Name : WS4_Projet
Objective : Création d’interfaces dynamiques avec Javascript
Technologies used : HTML, CSS, JavaScript
Project Description : The client wants a system that allows them to track their employees' tasks. The project involves designing and developing the front-end portion of the application using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, as well as creating desktop and mobile interface mockups. Is only the front-end part Link GitHub : https://github.com/EliaStack/WS4_Projet.git
Link Vercel : Prerequisites : server on http://localhost:3000/todos and folder "totolist" for the part back-end Installation : cd totolist and npm start
